zh.Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾梅爾
zh.lifeSummary: William de Mering於1270年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾梅爾。他於1299年與F de Meering在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾梅爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1299年在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Mering于1270年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾梅爾。他于1299年与F de Meering在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾梅爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1299年在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Georg, Johannes, Kurt, Reinhold.

variants.name: Geringer
meanings: habitational name for someone from Gering (Rhineland-Palatinate). Compare   Gehringer  .

variants.name: Gehring
meanings: German and Swiss German: from a medieval personal name, a short form of Gerhard or a similar name, formed with the first element gēr, gār ‘spear’ + the patronymic suffix -ing.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William de Mering was born in 1270, in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He married F de Meering in 1299, in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1299, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Mering est né en 1270, à Meering, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé F de Meering en 1299, à Meering, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1299, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William de Mering wurde 1270 in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1299 in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom F de Meering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1299 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: William de Mering è nato il nel 1270 nel Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato F de Meering nel 1299, nel Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1299, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Meringは1270年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアメエリングで生まれた。1299年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアメエリングでF de Meeringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1299年に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Mering(은)는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 메링에서 태어났다. 그는 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 메링에서 F de Meering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1299년 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William de Mering nasceu em 1270, em Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com F de Meering em 1299, em Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1299, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Mering родился в 1270 г. в местности миринг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени F de Meering в 1299 г. в местности миринг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1299 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William de Mering nació en 1270, en Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con F de Meering en 1299, en Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1299, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
